title: After the Arima Kinen: A Favor

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Faced with such powerful competition, Ines Fujin
suffers defeat at the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Family and friends heap praise on her solid effort
nonetheless. Her running captivated everyone
who saw it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines's running isn't a selfish act at all—it's the very
embodiment of everyone's dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Realizing that it's okay for her to run as much as
she wants, and to enjoy it too, Ines wells up. It's
not long before her cheeks are glistening with
warm tears.
